failure_detail: ProxyError: Remote end closed connection without response. mano-cua step API 调用失败。

mano_cua.result_summary: 成功绘制多边形并进入编辑模式，准备拖拽锚点测试吸附行为时 mano-cua ProxyError 断连。未能完成拖拽测试。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Edit mode is now active. All shapes have visible anchor points. Was about to drag anchor point across snap point when connection failed.
